title: Aureline merge-queue-entry vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the merge-queue-entry record family frozen in docs/vcs/hosted_review_and_merge_policy_contract.md. One merge_queue_entry_record pins one queue row for one review_workspace_record (the entry, distinct from the per-mutation merge_queue_action_record on schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json), names the bound provider rule snapshot ref, the queue-entry class from the closed five-value vocabulary (queue_eligible_admissible, queue_blocked_pending_resolution, queue_landed, queue_dequeued_by_actor, queue_failed_to_land_pending_review), the mergeability class from the closed seven-value vocabulary (mergeable_clean, mergeable_with_conflicts_pending_resolution, not_mergeable_required_check_failing, not_mergeable_required_review_missing_or_dismissed, not_mergeable_base_drifted_re_evaluation_required, not_mergeable_approval_invalidated_by_force_push, not_mergeable_policy_or_trust_blocked), the queue-entry blocked-reason from the closed nine-value vocabulary (not_blocked_entry_admissible, provider_rule_snapshot_stale, required_check_unverified_or_failing, required_review_missing_or_dismissed, base_drifted_relative_to_workspace, approval_invalidated_by_force_push, upstream_stack_member_blocked, policy_epoch_expired_re_evaluation_required, workspace_trust_unset_or_restricted), and the local-vs-provider rerun-authority class from the closed four-value vocabulary so a reviewer can answer 'who has authority to run this rerun' without opening the provider. Composes with schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json (provider_rule_snapshot identity), schemas/vcs/review_workspace_state.schema.json (stack-strip dependency view), schemas/vcs/patch_stack.schema.json (per-member dependency identity), and schemas/integration/approval_ticket.schema.json (per-mutation approval ticket). Raw bodies, raw URLs, and raw branch / commit identity strings never appear here. The eventual hosted-review-merge-queue crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new record kind, queue-entry class, mergeability class, blocked-reason value, rerun-authority class, lifecycle state, denial reason, or audit-event id is additive-minor and bumps merge_queue_entry_schema_version; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

merge_queue_entry_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for the merge-queue-entry vocabulary. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles. Raw absolute paths, raw branch / commit URLs, raw author identity strings, raw provider rule bodies, raw approval-ticket bodies, raw notebook cell text, raw terminal bytes, and raw URLs never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_label.description: Redaction-aware reviewable label (<= 1024 graphemes). Carries a presentation-only summary for support / audit; never carries the raw payload.

policy_context.description: Policy context the merge-queue entry was minted under.

merge_queue_entry_class.description: Frozen merge-queue-entry class vocabulary. queue_eligible_admissible MUST cite queue_entry_blocked_reason = not_blocked_entry_admissible and a non-not_mergeable_* mergeability class; a row that names any other reason or any not_mergeable_* class denies with merge_queue_entry_must_not_appear_eligible_under_blocked_reason. queue_blocked_pending_resolution MUST cite a non-not_blocked_* reason. queue_landed / queue_dequeued_by_actor / queue_failed_to_land_pending_review are terminal classes.

mergeability_class.description: Frozen mergeability vocabulary. mergeable_clean = no conflicts, no blocking checks, fresh base; mergeable_with_conflicts_pending_resolution = the workspace has conflicts the user MUST resolve before landing; the not_mergeable_* classes name the specific blocker so the chip the reviewer reads is mechanical.

queue_entry_blocked_reason.description: Frozen queue-entry blocked-reason vocabulary. not_blocked_entry_admissible MUST be paired with queue_eligible_admissible; the eight concrete blockers MUST be paired with queue_blocked_pending_resolution. A mismatch denies with merge_queue_entry_must_not_appear_eligible_under_blocked_reason.

local_vs_provider_rerun_authority_class.description: Frozen rerun-authority vocabulary. local_rerun_admissible_provider_rerun_unavailable = the provider cannot accept a rerun (outage / scope-restricted) and the local clone retains rerun authority; provider_rerun_authoritative_local_rerun_advisory = the provider holds rerun authority and the local rerun is advisory only; both_rerun_authorities_admissible_user_picks = the actor has scope on both sides and the user picks; no_rerun_admissible_re_evaluation_required_against_fresh_base = neither side can rerun against the current base; re-evaluation against a fresh base is required first.

merge_queue_entry_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary on the merge_queue_entry audit stream.

merge_queue_entry_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the merge_queue_entry stream. merge_queue_entry_audit_denial_emitted MUST cite a merge_queue_entry_denial_reason.

stack_strip_dependency_state_class.description: Re-exported from schemas/vcs/review_workspace_state.schema.json. Carried here so the merge-queue entry inherits the stack view without re-deriving it.

stack_dependency_strip_cell.description: Stack-dependency strip cell on a merge-queue entry. The entry inherits the stack view from the workspace-state row; this cell is the queue-side projection.

target_review_workspace_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the review_workspace_record (schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json) the entry acts on.

provider_rule_snapshot_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the bound provider rule snapshot. The snapshot row lives on the merge-queue-action record family in schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json; this entry never duplicates it.

stack_dependency_strip_cells.description: Stack / dependency strip on the entry. MAY be empty when the workspace is not part of a stack.

actor_ref.description: Opaque ref to the actor who proposed / enqueued the entry. Required (non-null) so the entry is attributable; raw author identity strings never appear here.

command_id_ref.description: Opaque ref to the command-dispatch id under which the entry was minted (see schemas/commands/command_descriptor.schema.json). Required (non-null).

approval_ticket_ref.description: Opaque ref to the approval ticket admitting this queue entry. Required (non-null) for queue_eligible_admissible and queue_landed entries; MAY be null on queue_blocked_pending_resolution / queue_dequeued_by_actor / queue_failed_to_land_pending_review entries (the per-mutation merge_queue_action_record carries the action-specific approval ticket on the action stream).

linked_merge_queue_action_id_refs.description: Optional list of opaque refs to the merge_queue_action_record rows on schemas/vcs/review_workspace.schema.json that have acted on this entry (enqueue, attempt, land, dequeue, mark-blocked). The entry is the row; the actions are the events.

merge_policy_record_id_ref.description: Forward-dependency slot reserved for the merge-policy resolver. Currently always null; once the merge-policy contract lands, every queue entry MUST cite the merge-policy row that resolved the entry's admission.

allOf.description: queue_blocked_pending_resolution MUST NOT cite queue_entry_blocked_reason = not_blocked_entry_admissible.

queue_eligible_admissible MUST NOT name a not_mergeable_* mergeability class; the entry's mergeability MUST resolve to mergeable_clean or mergeable_with_conflicts_pending_resolution. (Conflicts pending resolution remain queue_blocked in practice; the conflict-resolution-session contract owns that path.)

When stack_dependency_strip_cells contains a stack_dependency_blocked_upstream_member_blocked cell, merge_queue_entry_class MUST be queue_blocked_pending_resolution and queue_entry_blocked_reason MUST be upstream_stack_member_blocked.
queue_landed MUST cite a non-null approval_ticket_ref so the landing is attributable through to its admitting approval.

merge_queue_entry_record.description: Row shape consumed by merge-queue panels, hosted-review readers, and support / export. Exactly one row per active queue entry per workspace.

denial_reason.description: Required (non-null) when merge_queue_entry_audit_event_id_value is merge_queue_entry_audit_denial_emitted. Null otherwise.

allOf.description: denial_reason is required (non-null) when the event id is merge_queue_entry_audit_denial_emitted and MUST be null otherwise.

merge_queue_entry_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the merge_queue_entry stream.
